texto: So you say faith is not enough for you and you want knowledge, too. But knowledge does not involve spiritual effort; knowledge is obvious. Faith assumes effort. Knowledge is repose and faith is motion.
explicacao: Citação de Evgenij Vodolazkin sobre temas ligados a fe. “So you say faith is not enough for you and you want knowledge, too. But knowledge does not involv…” articula fe, faith, knowledge em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como knowledge e spiritual-effort.

frase_original: So you say faith is not enough for you and you want knowledge, too. But knowledge does not involve spiritual effort; knowledge is obvious. Faith assumes effort. Knowledge is repose and faith is motion.

texto: They embraced in parting. There were tears in the merchant’s eyes:“I do not like parting.”“Life consists of partings,” said Arseny. “But you can rejoice more fully in companionship when you remember that.”“But I would (the merchant Vladislav blew his nose) gather up all the good people I’ve met and never let them go.”“I think then they would quickly become mean,” smiled Ambrogio. (p. 238)
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Evgenij Vodolazkin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “They embraced in parting. There were tears in the merchant’s eyes:“I do not like parting.”“Life c…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, goodbyes, letting-go pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e letting-go.

frase_original: They embraced in parting. There were tears in the merchant’s eyes:“I do not like parting.”“Life consists of partings,” said Arseny. “But you can rejoice more fully in companionship when you remember that.”“But I would (the merchant Vladislav blew his nose) gather up all the good people I’ve met and never let them go.”“I think then they would quickly become mean,” smiled Ambrogio. (p. 238)
